AboutHero.name: Saman Khoshnood
AboutHero.title: Full-Stack Developer & SEO Specialist — Building web products with React, Next.js, and smart content strategy

items.title: Freelancer — Web Dev & SEO
items.desc: Building real-world projects with Next.js + Prisma + Tailwind. Technical SEO and content architecture for B2B clients.

items.title: Professional Learning & Side Projects
items.desc: Educational platform similar to Sabzlearn, Auth system with Refresh Tokens, PLC and automation.

MyStory.label: WHO AM I
MyStory.p1: I'm Saman Khoshnood, a full-stack web developer whose journey started with a curiosity about 'how websites work behind the scenes'. Now, mastering React and Next.js, I build applications that offer strong UX and rank well on search engines.
MyStory.p2: My difference is that I don't just 'write code' — I understand the core problem, choose the right architecture, and deliver a product that actually works.

items.title: Goal-Oriented
items.desc: Before writing any code, I understand the core business problem. Solutions must deliver results.

items.title: Performance First
items.desc: Clean code, excellent Core Web Vitals, and technical SEO done right from day one.

items.title: Full Transparency
items.desc: Real progress, honest time estimates, zero fluff.

hero.title: Beyond Coding; Engineering Scalable Systems.
hero.subtitle: I help businesses and industries transform their complex challenges into sustainable, profitable solutions through modern software architecture, AI, and systems thinking.

core.s1_desc: Designing and implementing fast, secure, and responsive web systems. From complex administrative dashboards to custom reservation platforms with modern cloud infrastructure.
core.s2_desc: Integrating intelligent algorithms and image processing for quality control, laboratory equipment data extraction, and industrial automation to minimize human error.
core.s3_desc: Modernizing corporate and B2B platforms with structural data architecture and product categorization. Transforming legacy websites into high-ranking digital assets.
core.s4_desc: Building custom applications and databases to eliminate paperwork, integrate scattered information, and maintain precise control over inventory, sales, and organizational workflows.

partner.title: Bridging Industry and Technology; Consulting & Networking
partner.desc: Digital transformation doesn't happen merely by writing code; it requires a profound understanding of industrial processes and a robust network of experts. As your technical accelerator and consultant, I analyze production line requirements and leverage my connections within the tech ecosystem to lead top-tier teams for large-scale enterprise projects.
partner.f1: Requirements analysis driven by systems thinking
partner.f2: Connecting specialized software teams to industrial projects
partner.f3: High-level architectural oversight and resource optimization

cta.title: Ready to engineer your next system?
